name: freight-plan-review
description: Structure a freight plan / strategic freight network review from user evidence or Future Connect notes — not professional advice

steps.text: Use skill urban-planner-competencies plan-freight + knowledge/urban-planning/freight-plan.md. Do not invent corridors or volumes.

steps.goal: Using skill urban-planner-competencies (procedures plan-freight and, if relevant, future-connect-freight) and knowledge/urban-planning/freight-plan.md plus at-future-connect-portal.md, produce a freight plan review: (1) verdict first (2) scope and sources (3) generators and network summary (4) issues/opportunities (5) options vs evaluation criteria matrix (6) recommended package and risks (7) engagement needs (8) explicit non-claims. If user only has Future Connect context, structure a portal observation checklist and a one-page issues note template filled only with stated facts.
criteria: Verdict first on freight problems and direction
Evaluation criteria from freight module used
No invented volumes or strategic classifications
